text:
Reoped because fonts and some applications output is garbage:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=199310
How to configure AGP such mode 1,2,4,8 as I understand default is -1(PCI mode).
https://wiki.freedesktop.org/xorg/RadeonFeature/
linux: radeon.modeset FreeBSD: hw.dri.0.modesetting?
linux: radeon.agpmode FreeBSD: ?????????
and why it not in handbook, it not obviously...
also fine fact glxgears faster ~40% with kernel AGP TTM support.
